raw:
{ 
  "perspective": "Assessment Science",
  "position": "for",
  "argument": "With the EIN received, Atlas should prioritize verifying the 83(b) election status to ensure compliance and avoid potential penalties. This is crucial as the CEO has already experienced a duplicate 83(b) filing issue, resulting in a $150 loss. Atlas must confirm whether Stripe Atlas has automatically handled the 83(b) election to prevent further errors.",
  "strongest_counter": "Some might argue that setting up the Mercury bank account should be the top priority, as it is essential for business operations. However, verifying the 83(b) election status is a time-sensitive matter that requires immediate attention to avoid potential legal and financial consequences.",
  "evidence_cited": "Class 19 — Assume-nothing about incorporation services (2026-04-24, $150 loss)",
  "whistleblower_flag": null
}
argument: With the EIN received, Atlas should prioritize verifying the 83(b) election status to ensure compliance and avoid potential penalties. This is crucial as the CEO has already experienced a duplicate 83(b) filing issue, resulting in a $150 loss. Atlas must confirm whether Stripe Atlas has automatically handled the 83(b) election to prevent further errors.
strongest_counter: Some might argue that setting up the Mercury bank account should be the top priority, as it is essential for business operations. However, verifying the 83(b) election status is a time-sensitive matter that requires immediate attention to avoid potential legal and financial consequences.
evidence_cited: Class 19 — Assume-nothing about incorporation services (2026-04-24, $150 loss)
